mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate compresses the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in the unemployment rate below 5.0 percent signals a tightening labor market that drives wage growth and consumer spending, supporting corporate earnings and equity valuations.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in more than 55% of instances where UNRATE drops below 5.0, or the signal's directional accuracy falls below 52% over a 5-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: Rising mortgage applications combined with increasing housing starts jointly indicate strengthening credit demand and construction activity, which reduces recession risk premiums and lifts equity prices.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces a negative or zero correlation with forward equity returns in more than 60% of rolling 3-year windows, or the interaction term in a multivariate regression is statistically insignificant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth exceeding 1.5 percent over a three-month window signals capacity utilization improvements during early recovery phases, directly boosting cyclical equity valuations.
failure_condition: Forward equity returns remain flat or negative in over 65% of triggered instances, or the signal's information coefficient decays to zero after the first quarter of the recovery cycle.

mechanism_narrative: Sequential quarterly growth in real GDP directly correlates with corporate revenue expansion, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent week as earnings expectations adjust upward.
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict positive returns in more than 55% of observations across multiple decades, or the rolling 12-month Sharpe ratio of the strategy falls below zero.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month inflation increase exceeding 0.5 percent forces expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, raising discount rates and compressing equity multiples over the following month.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive in more than 60% of triggered instances, or the signal's predictive power vanishes when controlling for actual Fed fund rate changes in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous payroll growth and a declining unemployment rate confirm labor market normalization, reducing recession risk premiums and supporting equity valuations over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: Walk-forward directional accuracy falls below 52% over a 5-year out-of-sample test, or the joint signal fails to outperform a single-proxy baseline in more than 70% of rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Housing permit declines below 1000 thousand units in late-cycle expansions signal impending credit tightening and consumer demand slowdown, triggering negative equity returns over the following month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 55% of triggered instances, or the signal's directional accuracy falls below 50% when tested against actual recession onset dates.
